_doc: Curated per-cell corrections for BS rows the deterministic extractor cannot recover (one-off OCR/layout artifacts) but whose correct values are legible in the PDF. Applied by scripts/apply_overrides.py to the production DB + pushed to D1, NO re-extraction. Each verified to bring its partition to 0 validation failures (dry-run). amount_total authoritative; tl+fc=total. NOT for genuine source defects or whole-section format breakage (those stay flagged).

net profit landed in the XX (discontinued-income) row; XIX held garbage -4.678.663. Equity statement confirms period net profit 6.632.553 with NO discontinued ops (TCI 6.632.553−OCI 1.764.044=4.868.509 reconciles). XIX=XVII+|XVIII|=4.858.673+1.773.880 (tax is a benefit). Prior period shows the same pattern (net 2.383.165 sits in XX)
phantom 6.632.553 here is the misplaced net profit (moved to XIX); no discontinued ops — XXI–XXIV nil and equity shows a single net-profit line → 0
blank in source; =XIX+XXIV=6.632.553+0; equals the equity-statement net profit, satisfies the net-vs-equity check
